column_mapping.delivery_delay_days: cast(DATEDIFF( CAST(actual_delivery_date AS DATE), CAST(planned_delivery_date AS DATE)) as int)
column_mapping.delivery_fill_rate: cast(ROUND( CASE WHEN cast(ordered_quantity as int) = 0 OR cast(ordered_quantity as int) IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE (cast(delivered_quantity as int) / cast(ordered_quantity as int)) * 100 END, 2) as int)
column_mapping.is_delayed: CASE WHEN actual_delivery_date IS NULL OR planned_delivery_date IS NULL THEN false WHEN CAST(actual_delivery_date AS DATE) > CAST(planned_delivery_date AS DATE) THEN true ELSE false END
